headline: AI-spending repricing has pushed MSFT, NVDA, AMD, and XLK to RSI extremes on 3+ measures — classic sentiment overshoot over intact businesses; MU and GOOG (Dow-add mechanical bid) are the top overbought fades.
US-Iran unwind flips precious metals & energy oversold while AI memory RSIs hit 30-year extremes — dual reversion opportunity with macro landmines.
